'''Fizzy-Bip''' was a beverage that existed in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Yoda" /> The drink was sold in bottles at [[Kwik-E-Mart]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]],<ref name="Prey">''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]''</ref> and it was also served in cartons on the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Reasonable Doubt]]''.<ref name="Yoda" />

{{Food-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Fizzy-Bip first appeared in the [[2004]] novel, ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' written by [[Sean Stewart]].<ref name="Yoda" />

*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st}}

*''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]''
